name: prodigy-ui
description: Animated UI components for modern web applications

components.name: stroke-cards
components.title: Stroke Cards
components.description: SVG path-drawing animation with masked image hover reveals. Each card traces its border on hover.

components.name: team-section
components.title: Team Section
components.description: Interactive team member showcase with GSAP-powered hover animations. Names animate in on profile hover.

components.name: gooey-bar
components.title: Gooey Bar
components.description: Animated status bar with gooey SVG filter effects. Hover over items to see fluid morphing animations with tooltips.

components.name: spring-back-card
components.title: Spring Back Card
components.description: 3D spring physics card that follows cursor movement with smooth lerp interpolation and rotation effects.

components.name: more-space-scroll
components.title: More Space Scroll
components.description: Smooth scrolling effect using Lenis with horizontal project showcase. Scroll vertically to move through horizontal content.

components.name: infinite-contact
components.title: Infinite Contact
components.description: Scroll-triggered infinite contact section with GSAP animations. Contact info animates infinitely as you scroll.

components.name: infinite-slider
components.title: Infinite Slider
components.description: Arc-shaped infinite image slider with GSAP scroll-triggered animations. Images arranged in a 3D arc perspective.

components.name: glowing-light
components.title: Glowing Light
components.description: Lottie-powered glowing light effect that tracks cursor movement with spotlight and mask animations.
